secrets.description: Public Usernode address (ut1…) of the custodial table treasury / pooled bank. Buy-ins are paid here and payouts + on-chain commit/reveal audit writes are signed from it. When unset, buy-ins are disabled.

Secret signing key for the table treasury wallet. Signs payouts and audit-anchor transactions. Never logged or returned by any API. Wallet key that holds real funds — encrypted at rest, isolated from staging.
Small blind in chips (= token base units).
Big blind in chips (= token base units).
Shot-clock per action in seconds. The timer pauses while a player's action transaction is pending/confirming on-chain.
Usernode node RPC base URL used by the treasury to submit signed transactions. Platform-managed in-network; this default is only a standalone fallback.
Micro-blog feed: points awarded to the author for each post. Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: points awarded to a post's author for each like it receives from another user (self-likes award none). Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: points required to mint 1 simulated in-app token when converting. Public tuning value.
Micro-blog feed: maximum characters allowed per post. Public tuning value.
Usernode address (ut1…) shown on the Trivia Quiz page as the source of future reward payouts. Display-only this phase (no on-chain payout yet). Public on-chain address.
How many questions each Trivia Quiz session contains (capped to the question bank size).
Per-session countdown for the Trivia Quiz, in seconds. When it hits zero the quiz auto-submits.
Minimum correct answers required (together with a valid ut1 wallet) for a result to be flagged reward-eligible.
